texto: Thanks to Obamacare, millions of Americans can visit a doctor’s office and see what a print magazine actually looks like.
autor: Joel McHale Commenting on print journalism at the White House Correspondents Dinner 2014
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Joel McHale Commenting on print journalism at the White House Correspondents Dinner 2014: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a trabalho. O trecho “Thanks to Obamacare, millions of Americans can visit a doctor’s office and see what a print magaz…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, journalism, president-obama pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e president-obama.
